href=\"https://mitocw.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new\"  >Contact Us</a>\n        </li>\n      </ul>\n    </div>\n  </nav>\n</div>\n\n\n<div id=\"desktop-header\">\n  <div class=\"contents\">\n  </a>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n    <div class=\"right\">\n      \n  \n  \n    <a class=\"nav-link search-icon text-white pr-6\" href=\"/search/\">\n      <i class=\"material-icons\">search</i>\n href=\"https://giving.mit.edu/give/to/ocw/?utm_source=ocw&amp;utm_medium=homepage_banner&amp;utm_campaign=nextgen_home\">\n        <span class=\"m-0 pr-2\">GIVE NOW</span>\n        <img py-2\"    href=\"/about\"  >about ocw</a>\n      <a   class=\"text-white text-decoration-none font-weight-bold px-3 py-2\"   target=\"_blank\"   href=\"https://mitocw.zendesk.com/hc/en-us\"  >help &amp; faqs</a>\n      <a   class=\"text-white text-decoration-none font-weight-bold px-3 py-2\"    href=\"https://mitocw.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/requests/new\"  >contact us</a>\n      <div class=\"user-menu-container\"></div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n    </span>\n    \n    \n\n<div id=\"course-banner\" class=\"p-0\">\n  <div class=\"max-content-width course-banner-content m-auto py-3\">\n    <div class=\"row\">\n    <div class=\"col-12\">\n      \n      <span class=\"course-number-term-detail\">6.728 | Fall 2006 | Graduate</span>\n      <br>\n      <br>\n      <h1>\n        <a\n          class=\"text-capitalize m-0 text-white\"\n          href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/\"\n        >Applied Quantum and Statistical Physics</a>\n      </h1>\n    </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n\n    <div id=\"course-main-content\">\n      <div class=\"row\">\n        <div class=\"col-12 course-home-grid\">\n          <div class=\"medium-and-below-only\">\n            <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center mb-3\">\n              <div class=\"col-6 px-0\">\n                <div>\n  <button\n    id=\"mobile-course-nav-toggle\"\n    class=\"mobile-course-nav-toggle-btn d-inline-flex align-items-center offcanvas-toggle\"\n    data-toggle=\"offcanvas\"\n    data-target=\"#mobile-course-nav\"\n  >\n    <img src=\"/static_shared/images/expand.a062b1c47b121e3c7e03.svg\" alt=\"\"/>\n    <span class=\"pl-1\">Menu</span>\n  </button>\n</div>\n\n              </div>\n              <div class=\"col-6 px-0\">\n                \n\n\n  <button \n    class=\"btn btn-link float-right mobile-course-info-toggle-btn toggle navbar-toggle offcanvas-toggle\"\n    id=\"mobile-course-info-toggle\"\n    data-toggle=\"offcanvas\" \n    data-target=\"#course-info-drawer\">\n    More Info\n  </button>\n\n\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          </div>\n        </div>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"row course-cards\">\n        <div class=\"col-2 course-home-grid large-and-above-only\">  \n          <div class=\"card\">\n  <div class=\"card-body pr-2\">\n    \n\n<nav class=\"course-nav\" aria-label=\"Course materials\">\n  <ul class=\"w-100 m-auto list-unstyled\">\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"bbac9756-9489-11fa-90c0-b79f4345be79\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/syllabus/\" >\n          Syllabus\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_bbac9756-9489-11fa-90c0-b79f4345be79\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_bbac9756-9489-11fa-90c0-b79f4345be79\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"d54123ec-d439-a664-5da4-7cdb6db6c14a\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/readings/\" >\n          Readings\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_d54123ec-d439-a664-5da4-7cdb6db6c14a\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_d54123ec-d439-a664-5da4-7cdb6db6c14a\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"62f66503-4d0a-8077-1375-37a6b21a98b4\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/assignments/\" >\n          Assignments\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_62f66503-4d0a-8077-1375-37a6b21a98b4\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_62f66503-4d0a-8077-1375-37a6b21a98b4\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"dfc87225-2584-35f4-b150-18ed8a42e390\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/exams/\" >\n          Exams\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_dfc87225-2584-35f4-b150-18ed8a42e390\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_dfc87225-2584-35f4-b150-18ed8a42e390\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"2c4132ae-7bf9-4900-bc93-263cd831948d\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/study-materials/\" >\n          Study Materials\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_2c4132ae-7bf9-4900-bc93-263cd831948d\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_2c4132ae-7bf9-4900-bc93-263cd831948d\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n      \n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<li class=\"course-nav-list-item\">\n  <div class=\"course-nav-parent d-flex flex-direction-row align-items-center justify-content-between\">\n    <span class=\"course-nav-text-wrapper\">\n      \n        <a class=\"text-dark nav-link\"\n          data-uuid=\"e265346e-a01a-5275-4bbc-9b6c31ba754a\"\n           href=\"/courses/6-728-applied-quantum-and-statistical-physics-fall-2006/pages/related-resources/\" >\n          Related Resources\n        </a>\n      \n    </span>\n    \n  </div>\n  \n  <span class=\"medium-and-below-only\"><hr/></span>\n  \n  <ul\n    class=\"course-nav-child-nav m-auto collapse\"\n    id=\"nav-container_desktop_e265346e-a01a-5275-4bbc-9b6c31ba754a\"\n    aria-labelledby=\"nav-button_desktop_e265346e-a01a-5275-4bbc-9b6c31ba754a\"\n  >\n    \n  </ul>\n</li>\n\n    \n  </ul>\n</nav>\n\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n        </div>\n        <div class=\"col-sm-12 col-lg-10 course-home-grid\">\n          <div class=\"\">\n            <div class=\"card\">\n              <div class=\"d-flex justify-content-between\">\n                <div class=\"p-0 col-lg-9\" id=\"main-course-section\">\n                  <div class=\"card-body\">\n                    \n<div class=\"mb-2\">\n  <header>\n  <div class=\"course-section-title-container\">\n    <div id=\"course-title\">\n      \n      <h2 class=\"pb-1 mb-1\">Syllabus</h2>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</header>\n\n  <article class=\"content pt-3 mt-1\">\n    <main id=\"course-content-section\">\n    <h3 id=\"course-meeting-times\">Course Meeting Times</h3>\n\n<p>Lectures: 2 sessions / week, 1.5 hours / session</p>\n<p>Recitations: 2 sessions / week, 1 hour / session</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"textbook\">Textbook</h3>\n\n<p>Hagelstein, Peter L., Stephen D. Senturia, and Terry P. Orlando. <em>Introduction to Applied Quantum and Statistical Physics</em>. New York, NY: Wiley, 2004. ISBN: 0471202762.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"homework\">Homework</h3>\n\n<p>There will be about ten homework sets and two quiz-completion exercises (see also Quizzes below). Homework due dates vary and are listed on the Schedule. You may use any resource available on the homework, including textbooks, and you may work with other students in developing both insight and answers. However, you are required to write up your own final solutions and MATLAB® codes. <strong>Copying a solution from another student or from a previous problem solution is not permitted.</strong> As a precaution against any misunderstanding, we suggest that if you learn the solution to a problem from another source, whether printed or human, you identify the source on your homework paper.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"quizzes\">Quizzes</h3>\n\n<p>There will be two one-hour quizzes in class.</p>\n<p>Quiz Dates: Ses #16 and Ses #27.</p>\n<p>One sheet of notes is permitted at the quizzes. After completing and turning in your Quiz paper, you will be given until the start of class on the Wednesday following the Quiz to write up complete Quiz solutions as a take-home exercise. Quiz grades will be computed as the average of your in-class score and your final completed score.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"final-exam\">Final Exam</h3>\n\n<p>There will be a 3 hour final exam.</p>\n\n    <h3 id=\"grading\">Grading</h3>\n\n<p>The instructors reserve the right to use judgment instead of formulae when assigning final grades.</p>\n<p><table>\n\n<thead>\n\n<tr>\n\n<th>\n\nACTIVITIES\n</th>\n\n<th>\n\nWEIGHTS\n</th>\n</p>\n</tr>\n\n<p></thead>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nHomework\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n1/3\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nQuizzes\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n1/3\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nFinal Exam\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n1/3\n</td>\n</p>\n</tr>\n\n</table>\n\n\n    <h3 id=\"calendar\">Calendar</h3>\n\n<p>The calendar below provides information on the course&rsquo;s lecture (L), recitation (R), and quiz (Q) sessions.</p>\n<p><table>\n\n<thead>\n\n<tr>\n\n<th>\n\nSES #\n</th>\n\n<th>\n\nTOPICS\n</th>\n\n<th>\n\nKEY DATES\n</th>\n</p>\n</tr>\n\n<p></thead>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL1\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nIntroduction: Classical and Quantum Mechanics\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 1 out\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL2\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProbability Amplitudes and Development of Quanta\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR1\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nFourier Transforms / MATLAB®\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL3\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nDispersion, Wavepackets\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 2 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 1 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL4\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nOperators and Ehrenfest&rsquo;s Theorem\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR2\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nExamples of Operators and Ehrenfest&rsquo;s Theorem\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL5\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nEigenfunctions, Eigenvalues, Superposition\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 3 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 2 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL6\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nFinite Well and 1D Box\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL7\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTunneling Barriers\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 4 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 3 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL8\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nSimple Harmonic Oscillator\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR3\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTunneling Examples, STM, SHO\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL9\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nRaising and Lowering Operators\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 5 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 4 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL10\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nLC Circuit &amp; SHO Wavepackets\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL11\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nWKB Approximation, Variational Method\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 5 due\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL12\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nFinite Basis Set Approximation\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nQ1\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nQuiz 1\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL13\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTwo-level System (dc Drive)\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 6 out\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL14\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTwo-level System (cont.)\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR4\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nExamples of Two-level Systems\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL15\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTwo-level System: Dynamic Drive\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 7 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 6 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL16\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nCoupled Systems\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR5\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nTwo-level Examples and Coupled System\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL17\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nCoupled Systems\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 8 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 7 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL18\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n2D and 3D; Density of States\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR6\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nExamples and Periodic Boundary Conditions\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL19\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nQuantization of the E and M Fields\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 8 due\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nQ2\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nQuiz 2\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL20\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nFermi&rsquo;s Golden Rule\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 9 out\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL21\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nStatistical Physics\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR7\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nExamples of Statistical Physics\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL22\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nStatistical Physics II\n</td>\n\n<td>\n</p>\n<p>Problem set 10 out</p>\n<p>Problem set 9 due</p>\n</td>\n\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR8\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nThermionic Emission\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL23\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nMetals and Semiconductors I\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nProblem set 10 due\n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL24\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nMetals and Semiconductors II\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR9\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nExamples of Metals and Semiconductors\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL25\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nH-Atom I\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL26\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nH-Atom II\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nR10\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nH-Atom Examples\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\nL27\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nSummary\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n<p></tr>\n\n<tr>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n\n<td>\n\nFinal Exam\n</td>\n\n<td>\n\n \n</td>\n</p>\n</tr>\n\n</table>\n\n</main>\n  </article>\n</div>\n\n\n                  </div>\n                </div>\n                \n                  <button \n  type=\"button\" \n  class=\"btn course-info-button large-and-above-only\"\n  id=\"desktop-course-drawer-button\"\n  data-target=\"#desktop-course-drawer\"\n  data-toggle=\"collapse\"\n  aria-label=\"Course Info\"\n  aria-controls=\"desktop-course-drawer\"\n  aria-expanded=\"false\"\n>\n  <img\n    class=\"expand-drawer-img drawer-icon-img\"\n    src=\"/static_shared/images/left_arrow.3c482a1f6223bff3f0e6.svg\"\n    alt=\"\"\n  />\n  <img\n    class=\"collapse-drawer-img drawer-icon-img\"\n    src=\"/static_shared/images/close_small.b0a2684ccc0da6407a56.svg\"\n    alt=\"\"\n  />\n</button>\n\n<div class=\"collapse border-left p-0 large-and-above-only col-3\" id=\"desktop-course-drawer\">\n    \n\n<div class=\"course-info\">\n  <div class=\"course-detail-title bg-light-gray\">\n    <h2 class=\"font-black py-1 pl-3 m-0\">\n      Course Info\n    </h2>\n  </div>\n  <div class=\"px-3 mt-4\">\n    <div class=\"row\">\n      <div class=\"col-12 \">\n        \n        <div class=\"\">\n          \n          <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label panel-course-info-title \">\n            Instructor\n            </h3>\n          <div class=\"course-info-content panel-course-info-text\">\n            \n\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"list-unstyled m-0\">\n  \n  \n  \n    \n  \n  <li>\n    <a   class=\"course-info-instructor strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?q=Prof.&#43;Terry&#43;Orlando\"  >Prof. Terry Orlando</a>\n  </li>\n  \n</ul>\n\n\n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n        \n          \n          \n            <div class=\"mt-4\">\n              <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label panel-course-info-title \">\n                Departments\n              </h3>\n              <div class=\"course-info-content panel-course-info-text\">\n                \n\n\n\n\n<ul class=\"list-unstyled m-0\">\n  \n  \n  \n    \n  \n  <li>\n    <a   class=\"course-info-department strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?d=Electrical&#43;Engineering&#43;and&#43;Computer&#43;Science\"  >Electrical Engineering and Computer Science</a>\n  </li>\n  \n</ul>\n\n\n              </div>\n            </div>\n          \n         \n        \n        <div class=\"mt-4\">\n          <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label panel-course-info-title \">\n            As Taught In\n          </h3>\n          <div class=\"course-info-content panel-course-info-text\">\n            Fall\n            \n              2006\n            \n          </div>\n        </div>\n\n        <div class=\"mt-4\">\n          <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label panel-course-info-title \">\n            Level\n          </h3>\n          <div class=\"course-info-content panel-course-info-text\">\n            \n              \n                <a   class=\" strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?l=Graduate\"  >Graduate</a><br />\n              \n            \n          </div>\n        </div>\n        \n      </div>\n\n      \n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n  <div class=\"px-3\">\n    \n\n\n\n\n\n<div class=\" mt-4\">\n  <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label panel-course-info-title \">\n    Topics\n  </h3>\n  <ul class=\"list-unstyled pb-2 m-0 panel-course-info-text\">\n      <li>\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<div class=\"position-relative pt-1 pb-1 pl-4 ml-n2 \">\n  \n  <button\n    type=\"button\"\n    class=\"topic-toggle border-0 bg-transparent pl-0\"\n    data-target=\"#subtopic-container_desktop_0\"\n    data-toggle=\"collapse\"\n    aria-controls=\"subtopic-container_desktop_0\"\n    aria-expanded=\"true\"\n    aria-label=\"Mathematics subtopics\"\n  >\n    <i aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons\"></i>\n  </button>\n  \n subtopic-container collapse show list-unstyled\"\n  id=\"subtopic-container_desktop_0\"\n  aria-label=\"Subtopics\"\n>\n  \n  \n  \n  <li>\n    <div class=\"position-relative pt-1 pb-1  pl-2 \">\n      \n      <span class=\"topic-text-wrapper\">\n        \n        <a   class=\"text-black course-info-topic strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?t=Probability&#43;and&#43;Statistics\"  >Probability and Statistics</a></span>\n    </div>\n    <ul\n      class=\"collapse show list-unstyled\"\n      id=\"speciality-container_desktop_0_0\"\n      aria-label=\"Specialties\"\n    >\n      \n    </ul>\n    \n  </li>\n  \n</ul>\n\n</li>\n      <li>\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n\n<div class=\"position-relative pt-1 pb-1 pl-4 ml-n2 \">\n  \n  <button\n    type=\"button\"\n    class=\"topic-toggle border-0 bg-transparent pl-0\"\n    data-target=\"#subtopic-container_desktop_1\"\n    data-toggle=\"collapse\"\n    aria-controls=\"subtopic-container_desktop_1\"\n    aria-expanded=\"false\"\n    aria-label=\"Science subtopics\"\n  >\n    <i aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons\"></i>\n  </button>\n  \n  <span class=\"topic-text-wrapper\">\n    <a   class=\"text-black course-info-topic aria-label=\"Subtopics\"\n>\n  \n  \n  \n  <li>\n    <div class=\"position-relative pt-1 pb-1  pl-4 \">\n      \n      <button\n        class=\"topic-toggle border-0 bg-transparent pl-0\"\n        data-target=\"#speciality-container_desktop_1_0\"\n        data-toggle=\"collapse\"\n        aria-controls=\"speciality-container_desktop_1_0\"\n        aria-expanded=\"false\"\n        aria-label=\"Physics specialties\"\n      >\n        <i aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons\"></i>\n      </button>\n      \n      <span class=\"topic-text-wrapper\">\n        \n        <a   class=\"text-black course-info-topic strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?t=Physics\"  >Physics</a></span>\n    </div>\n    <ul\n      class=\"collapse list-unstyled\"\n      id=\"speciality-container_desktop_1_0\"\n      aria-label=\"Specialties\"\n    >\n      \n      <li class=\"pt-1 pb-1 pl-5\">\n        <span class=\"topic-text-wrapper\">\n          \n          <a     <span class=\"topic-text-wrapper\">\n          \n          <a   class=\"text-black course-info-topic strip-link-offline\"    href=\"/search/?t=Quantum&#43;Mechanics\"  >Quantum Mechanics</a></span>\n      </li>\n      \n    </ul>\n    \n  </li>\n  \n</ul>\n\n</li>\n      \n  </ul>\n</div>\n\n    \n\n\n\n<div class=\"\">\n  <h3 class=\"course-info-section-label course-detail-title panel-course-info-title mt-3\">\n    Learning Resource Types\n  </h3>\n  <div>\n    <div class=\"row d-inline m-0\">\n      \n        <div class=\"panel-course-info-text my-2\">\n          \n\n<div class=\"\">\n  <div class=\"d-flex\">\n    <i aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons pr-1\">grading</i>\n    <span>Exams</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n        </div>\n      \n        <div class=\"panel-course-info-text my-2\">\n          \n\n<div class=\"\">\n  <div class=\"d-flex\">\n    <i aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons pr-1\">assignment</i>\n    <span>Problem Sets</span>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n        </div>\n      \n        <div class=\"panel-course-info-text my-2\">\n          \n\n<div class=\"\">\n  <div class=\"d-flex\">\n    <i aria-hidden=\"true\" Massachusetts Institute of Technology\n\t\t</div>\n    \n\n\n    \n    <script src=\"/static_shared/js/common.c6351.js\"></script>\n    \n\n    \n    <script src=\"/static_shared/js/course_v2.c6351.js\"></script>\n    \n\n\n\n\n\n    \n<script async src=\"https://w.appzi.io/w.js?token=Tgs1d\"></script>\n\n\t</div>\n</div>\n\n  </div>\n  <script>\nfunction hideLinksOffline(){\n  if (!window.navigator.onLine) {\n    const stripLinks = document.querySelectorAll(\".strip-link-offline\")\n    const hideOffline = document.querySelectorAll(\".hide-offline\")\n    const showOffline = document.querySelectorAll(\".show-offline\")\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(stripLinks, function(link) {\n      link.outerHTML = link.innerHTML\n    })\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(hideOffline, function(link) {\n      link.classList.add(\"d-none\")\n    })\n    Array.prototype.forEach.call(showOffline, function(link) {\n      link.classList.remove(\"d-none\")\n    })\n  }\n}\nhideLinksOffline()\n</script>\n\n  \n\n<div\n  class=\"modal\"\n  id=\"external-link-modal\"\n  tabindex=\"-1\"\n  role=\"dialog\"\n  aria-labelledby=\"external-link-modal-title\"\n  aria-hidden=\"true\"\n>\n  <div class=\"modal-dialog modal-dialog-centered\" role=\"document\">\n    <div class=\"modal-content p-3\">\n      <div class=\"modal-header d-flex align-items-center\">\n        <div class=\"d-flex align-items-center\">\n          <img\n            class=\"modal-header-icon-img mr-3 align-baseline\"\n            src=\"/static_shared/images/external_link.58bbdd86c00a2c146c36.svg\"\n            alt=\"\"\n            aria-hidden=\"true\"\n          />\n          <h1 class=\"modal-title\" id=\"external-link-modal-title\">\n            You are leaving MIT OpenCourseWare\n          </h1>\n        </div>\n        <button type=\"button\" class=\"border-0 p-0 bg-transparent d-flex\" data-dismiss=\"modal\" aria-label=\"Close\">\n          <span aria-hidden=\"true\" class=\"material-icons modal-header-icon\">close</span>\n        </button>\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-body\">\n        Please be advised that external sites may have terms and conditions, \n        including license rights, that differ from ours. MIT OCW is not responsible \n        for any content on third party sites, nor does a link suggest an endorsement \n        of those sites and/or their content.\n      </div>\n      <div class=\"modal-footer\">\n        <button\n          type=\"button\"\n          class=\"btn btn-outline-primary btn-link link-button\"\n          data-dismiss=\"modal\"\n          >\n            Stay Here\n        </button>\n        <a\n          role=\"button\"\n          class=\"btn btn-primary btn-continue\"\n          target=\"_blank\"\n          href=\"#\"\n        >\n          Continue\n        </a>\n      </div>\n    </div>\n  </div>\n</div>\n\n  <script>\n    \n    \n    \n    \n    \n    \n    'use strict';\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY = \"desktopCourseDrawerState\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED = \"opened\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_CLOSED = \"closed\"\n    \n    const DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID = \"desktop-course-drawer\"\n    const COURSE_DRAWER_BTN_ID = \"desktop-course-drawer-button\"\n    const MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID = \"main-course-section\"\n\n    try{\n\n      \n\n      function initializeDesktopCourseDrawerState() {\n        const state = getLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY)\n        if (state === null) {\n          \n          setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n          showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n        } else {\n          showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(state)\n        }\n\n        document.addEventListener(\"DOMContentLoaded\", () => {\n          const drawer = $(`#${DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID}`)\n          const mainSection = $(`#${MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID}`)\n\n          drawer.on(\"shown.bs.collapse\", (event) => {\n            if (event.target.id !== DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID) {\n              return;\n            }\n            mainSection.addClass(\"col-lg-9\")\n            mainSection.removeClass(\"col-12\")\n            setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED)\n          })\n      \n          drawer.on(\"hidden.bs.collapse\", (event) => {\n            if (event.target.id !== DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID) {\n              return;\n            }\n            mainSection.addClass(\"col-12\")\n            mainSection.removeClass(\"col-lg-9\")\n            setLocalStorageItem(COURSE_DRAWER_LOCAL_STORAGE_KEY, COURSE_DRAWER_CLOSED)\n          })\n        })\n      }\n\n      function showOrHideDesktopCourseDrawer(state) {\n        const drawer = document.getElementById(DESKTOP_COURSE_DRAWER_ID)\n        const button = document.getElementById(COURSE_DRAWER_BTN_ID)\n        const mainSection = document.getElementById(MAIN_COURSE_SECTION_ID)\n\n        if (state === COURSE_DRAWER_OPENED) {\n          drawer.classList.add(\"show\")\n          button.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"true\")\n        } else {\n          drawer.classList.remove(\"show\")\n          button.setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\", \"false\")\n          mainSection.classList.remove(\"col-lg-9\")\n          mainSection.classList.add(\"col-12\")\n        }\n      }\n\n      function setOrGetLocalStorageItem(action,key,value) {\n        try {\n          \n          if (typeof Storage !== \"undefined\") {\n            if (action === \"set\") {\n              localStorage.setItem(key, value)\n              return true\n            } else {\n              return localStorage.getItem(key)\n            }\n          }\n          console.error(\"This browser has no web storage support.\")\n          return null\n        } catch (e) {\n          console.error(\"An exception occurred while storing/fetching data in/from localstorage: \", e)\n          return null\n        }\n      }\n\n      function setLocalStorageItem(key, value) {\n        return setOrGetLocalStorageItem(\"set\", key, value)\n      }\n      \n      function getLocalStorageItem(key){\n        return setOrGetLocalStorageItem(\"get\", key)\n      }\n\n      initializeDesktopCourseDrawerState();\n    }\n    catch(e){\n      console.error(\"Something went wrong in maintaining/toggling course drawer state\", e)\n    }\n  </script>\n\n  \n\n<script>\nfunction expandNav(e,t){t.classList.add(\"show\"),e.querySelector(\".course-nav-section-toggle, video-tab-toggle-section\").setAttribute(\"aria-expanded\",\"true\")}function courseNav(){document.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav, .transcript-header\").forEach(e=>{e.querySelectorAll(\".nav-link\").forEach(e=>{const t=e.getAttribute(\"href\")?e.getAttribute(\"href\"):\"\";if(t.replace(/\\/$/,\"\")===window.location.pathname.replace(/\\/$/,\"\")){e.classList.add(\"active\");const s=e.closest(\".course-nav-parent\");s?.classList.add(\"active\");const o=e.dataset.uuid,t=e.closest(\".course-nav-list-item\"),n=t?.querySelector(\".collapse\"),i=Array.prototype.filter.call(document.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav-section-toggle\"),e=>e.dataset.uuid===o);t&&n&&i.length>0&&expandNav(t,n)}});const t=e.querySelector(\"a.nav-link.active\");e.querySelectorAll(\".course-nav-list-item\").forEach(e=>{const n=e.querySelector(\".collapse\");n&&n.contains(t)&&expandNav(e,n)})})}courseNav()\n</script>\n\n  \n\n<script>\n(()=>{var e=()=>document.querySelectorAll(\"#course-content-section table\"),t=()=>document.getElementById(\"course-content-section\");function n(){const o=e(),n=t();if(!n)return;if(!window.ResizeObserver)return;const i=new ResizeObserver(()=>s());i.observe(n),o.forEach(e=>{const t=e.getElementsByTagName(\"th\"),n=e.querySelectorAll(\"table tr\");n.forEach(e=>{const n=e.querySelectorAll(\"td\");n.forEach((e,s)=>{t.length>=s+1&&(n[s].dataset.title=t[s].innerText.trim().concat(\": \"))})})})}function s(){const s=e(),n=t();if(!n)return;s.forEach(e=>{const t=n.getBoundingClientRect(),o=+(e.dataset.minWidth??0);t.width>o&&e.classList.remove(\"mobile-table\");const s=e.getBoundingClientRect();s.right>t.right&&(e.dataset.minWidth=`${s.width}`,e.classList.add(\"mobile-table\"))})}n()})()\n</script>\n\n</body>\n\n</html>\n"}
